data.body: LANDED: R6+R7 stack. R6 #760 recheck passed Verified+1 (probabilistic; flake didn't fire). Both submittable (LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1, 0 unresolved) -> submitted #761 which pulled #760 -> BOTH MERGED to main (Gerrit fast-forwarded, no rebase; landed commits = my shas 062987955 R6, 8ce0cf8ef R7). CLOSES: R6 (5dac) closed+SIGNED (plan-review + completion-verifier attestations, signature present). R7 (b1a4) close FAILED on untagged AC 'make lint/typecheck/test green; landed through Gerrit' (evidence lives outside codebase) -> remediated per ADR-0043: tagged criterion [operator-attested] + recorded attestation comment (change 761 MERGED commit 8ce0cf8ef, Verified+1, LLM-Review+1) -> re-closing. LEARNING: E2/E6/E3 have the same 'landed through Gerrit' AC; tag [operator-attested] POST-CLAIM (before close) so plan-review attestation stays valid for the claim. Now: 3 harness builds in flight (E2 re-review r2, E6 build, E3 build).
